submodules.name: UI Toolkit Framework
submodules.description: UI Toolkit is a collection of features, resources, and tools for developing user interface (UI). (https://docs.unity3d.com/Documentation/Manual/UIElements.html)

submodules.name: UI Toolkit Visual Elements
submodules.description: Various UI Elements of UI Toolkit (https://docs.unity3d.com/Documentation/Manual/UIElements.html)

submodules.name: UI Toolkit Base Fields
submodules.description: Base classes for UI elements with bindable value (https://docs.unity3d.com/ScriptReference/UIElements.BindableElement.html)

submodules.name: UI Toolkit Columns
submodules.description: Columns data structures for multi column views (https://docs.unity3d.com/ScriptReference/UIElements.Columns.html)

submodules.name: UI Toolkit MultiColumnController
submodules.description: Default controller for multi column UI elements (https://docs.unity3d.com/ScriptReference/UIElements.MultiColumnController.html)

submodules.name: UI Toolkit TextSelectingManipulator
submodules.description: Provides support for selecting text in UI Toolkit.

submodules.name: UI Toolkit TextEditingManipulator
submodules.description: Provides support for editing text in UI Toolkit.
